description_long: This is a modern, two-story bungalow with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The exterior is predominantly white with large, rectangular windows distributed across all sides, allowing for ample natural light. The property is enclosed by a light-colored fence and features a spacious green lawn with a single tall conifer tree and a small patio area. The front facade includes a covered entryway and a carport or sheltered area adjacent to the main entrance. The rear of the bungalow opens onto a larger yard, providing outdoor living space. The overall aesthetic is minimalist, with straight lines and a focus on open, functional spaces.
description: A modern, two-story white bungalow with flat roofs, large windows, and a fenced green yard featuring a tall tree and patio area.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered entryway, and carport, with the lawn and fence visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the building, the carport, and the tall tree in the backyard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the expansive backyard, patio area, and the tree, with the back facade's windows visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the long row of windows and the fenced yard, with the tree and patio in the background.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on all facades
